data.title: Why Bakkt (BKKT) Stock Is Skyrocketing Today
data.description: Bakkt shares are trading higher by 35% during Thursday's session. The company announced a strategic partnership with Distributed Technologies.

Caleres Reports Lower Q4 Sales, Cautious Outlook For 2025 Amid Inflation And Tariffs
data.description: Caleres shares rise after reporting Q4 results. Revenues down 8.3%, adjusted EPS beats consensus, Outlook for FY25 and Q1 is lower.

data.title: D-Wave Unveils New Blockchain Architecture To Slash Energy Usage
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) unveils a new blockchain architecture in its latest research, combining quantum computing with traditional blockchain to improve security and efficiency. The study, "Blockchain with Proof of Quantum Work," introduces a quantum-powered algorithm that significantly reduces energy consumption, potentially slashing it by up to 1,000 times compared to traditional methods.
